name: Standard Deviation Calculator
description: Industrial-grade standard deviation calculator for process variability analysis, compliant with ISO 5725, Six Sigma, and Lean manufacturing standards.

inputs.label: Data Points (comma or space separated)
inputs.businessContext: Raw measurements from process output, e.g., dimensions, weights, cycle times.

businessContext_i18n.en: Raw measurements from process output, e.g., dimensions, weights, cycle times.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Süreç çıktısından alınan ham ölçümler, örn. boyutlar, ağırlıklar, çevrim süreleri.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of observations in the sample. Must be at least 2 for standard deviation calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of observations in the sample. Must be at least 2 for standard deviation calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örneklemdeki gözlem sayısı. Standart sapma hesaplaması için en az 2 olmalıdır.

inputs.label: Data Type
inputs.businessContext: Continuous data (e.g., length, time) vs discrete (e.g., count of defects). Affects interpretation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Continuous data (e.g., length, time) vs discrete (e.g., count of defects). Affects interpretation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürekli veri (örn. uzunluk, süre) vs ayrık (örn. kusur sayısı). Yorumlamayı etkiler.

inputs.label: Population or Sample?
inputs.businessContext: Select 'population' if data covers entire population (n=N), else 'sample' for Bessel's correction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select 'population' if data covers entire population (n=N), else 'sample' for Bessel's correction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veriler tüm popülasyonu kapsıyorsa 'popülasyon' (n=N), aksi halde Bessel düzeltmesi için 'örneklem' seçin.

inputs.label: Unit of Measure
inputs.businessContext: Physical unit of the data points (e.g., mm, sec, kg). Used for output labeling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical unit of the data points (e.g., mm, sec, kg). Used for output labeling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri noktalarının fiziksel birimi (örn. mm, sn, kg). Çıktı etiketlemesi için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
inputs.businessContext: Lower bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lower bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik spesifikasyonlarına göre kabul edilebilir süreç çıktısının alt sınırı.

inputs.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
inputs.businessContext: Upper bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Upper bound of acceptable process output per engineering specifications.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik spesifikasyonlarına göre kabul edilebilir süreç çıktısının üst sınırı.

inputs.label: Target Value (Nominal)
inputs.businessContext: Ideal process target, often the midpoint of specification limits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ideal process target, often the midpoint of specification limits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İdeal süreç hedefi, genellikle spesifikasyon limitlerinin orta noktası.

rules.message: Sample size must be at least 2 to compute standard deviation.
Number of data points provided must equal the sample size.
Lower specification limit must be less than upper specification limit.
Target value should lie within specification limits for optimal process centering.

thresholds.message: Process variation exceeds 1/6 of tolerance band (Cp < 1.0). Improvement needed.
Process variation moderate (Cp between 1.0 and 1.33). Consider tightening.
Process mean is off-target by more than 0.5 sigma. Adjust centering.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
